page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

In terms of performance, the instance exhibits modest benchmark results. Its stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU performance fall into the bottom 25%, reflecting its position as an entry-level compute-optimized option. Memory bandwidth benchmarks, including read-only and write operations on large blocks, also rank in the bottom 25%. However, the processor supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and AVX512_VNNI, which can accelerate specific vector and neural network workloads.

The ecs.c6.xlarge is designed for workloads that require dedicated CPU resources but have low memory footprints. Given its benchmark profile, which includes average performance in single-threaded bzip3 decompression but weaker results in database operations, redis SET operations, and static web serving, this instance is best suited for light compute tasks, batch processing, and development or testing environments that do not demand high memory capacity or extreme I/O throughput.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs and 4 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor clocked at 2.5 GHz. Equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM, it offers a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio with no local storage or GPU accelerators. The instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks place this server in the lower tiers, with stress-ng CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations generally ranking in the bottom 25%, though it maintains average single-threaded bzip3 decompression performance. Supported by AVX-512 instruction sets, it is qualitatively cost-efficient for dedicated compute workloads with low memory requirements. It is best suited for light batch processing, basic web serving, and development environments.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for light compute workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.xlarge features 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth for compute-focused workloads.
tagline: A dedicated compute-optimized instance featuring Intel Xeon processors and a balanced 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio for entry-level workloads.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated vCPUs and 4 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor
8.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
Baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps with no local storage
Supports AVX-512 and AVX512_VNNI instruction sets
Best suited for light batch processing, development environments, and basic compute tasks
